buildCampaignFailed: Failed to build campaign. Please try again.
completionDescription: We've analyzed your website, mapped the competitive landscape, and built a custom campaign brief tailored to your brand.
contextChatHint: Have extra context? Share it to improve your results.
contextChatPlaceholder: Add context about your brand, paste content, or describe your goals...
leavePageDescription: Your discovery is still in progress. Leaving now may interrupt the analysis.
manualIngestionHint: Tell us about it here. Manual ingestion is prioritized over crawl.
phaseBrandingDnaDesc: Extracting visual identity, tone of voice, and brand personality markers from existing content.
phaseBusinessContextDesc: Gathering core business information, mission statements, and brand positioning to establish baseline context.
phaseCategorizeDesc: Classifying findings into thematic categories and identifying cross-cutting themes.
phaseCauseResearchDesc: Researching cause impact data, community initiatives, and social responsibility metrics.
phaseLlmStructuringDesc: Running large-language-model analysis to structure raw data into actionable campaign insights.
phaseMapLandscapeDesc: Scanning the competitive landscape, identifying key players, and mapping market positioning.
phaseNewsSignalPullDesc: Pulling recent news signals, press coverage, and trending topics relevant to your brand.
phaseRankingDesc: Scoring and ranking all discovered insights to surface the highest-impact campaign opportunities.
phaseSitemapArchitectureDesc: Analyzing website sitemap structure, page hierarchy, and content architecture.
